result.summary: Found 1 major issue: the disclaimer/fine print text at the bottom of the page is extremely small and difficult to read, creating accessibility and legibility concerns.

issues.description: The fine print disclaimer text (starting with 'Player may receive POKER offer...') is too small to read comfortably and fails to meet accessibility standards for text legibility
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size of the disclaimer text to at least 12px, or provide a 'View Full Terms' expandable section. Ensure sufficient contrast and line-height for readability
